name: World Warfare & Economics
short_description: Take control of any nation and shape its future. Manage resources, trade, and taxes, engage in real-time warfare, navigate global diplomacy, and react to dynamic world events. Build a thriving economy, forge alliances, and command armies in a constantly evolving world!
detailed_description:
This game has been developed by a single developer

Only with your help we can adapt, improve the game, and overcome many of its development challenges. Together we can create the game we all want to play!

Join the official World Warfare and Economics Discord server to share your ideas, feedback, and stay on top of the latest news!


About the Game

Rule Any Nation

Take control of any country and lead it through the ever-changing tides of history. Whether you guide a global superpower, a growing regional force, or a small nation struggling for survival, your leadership will determine its future. Will you expand your influence through diplomacy and trade, or will you dominate through military strength? Every decision shapes your country's fate.

Economic Mastery

A strong economy is the backbone of any successful nation. Manage your country’s resources, taxes, trade agreements, and GDP growth to ensure financial stability. Develop industries, invest in infrastructure, and decide how much government control to exert over the economy. Will you create a capitalist powerhouse, a centrally planned economy, or something in between? Adapt to global market shifts and economic crises as you build your nation’s financial future.

Diplomacy & Geopolitics

The world is a complex web of alliances, treaties, and rivalries. Send envoys to negotiate trade deals, establish diplomatic relations, and secure international support. Join intergovernmental organizations (IGOs) like the United Nations, sign defense pacts, or forge secret agreements to outmaneuver your opponents. React to global events, respond to diplomatic crises, and decide whether to build lasting peace or escalate tensions for strategic gain.

Real-Time Warfare

Engage in large-scale battles where strategy and tactics determine the outcome. Command armies on land, air, and sea, deploying your forces with precision in real-time combat. Plan offensives, fortify defenses, and utilize modern military technology to outmaneuver your enemies. Logistics, supply chains, and battlefield conditions all play a crucial role—will you be a careful strategist or a relentless conqueror?

Dynamic World Events

The world doesn’t stand still. From natural disasters that threaten global economies to sports championships that unite (or divide) nations, history unfolds in real-time. Political revolutions, stock market crashes, and scientific breakthroughs will challenge your leadership. Will you seize opportunities to strengthen your position, or will global crises force you into difficult decisions? Every playthrough is shaped by an evolving world full of surprises.
